test_cases.title: Summarizer compresses 745KB report to <= 10KB
test_cases.description: Feed the real retrospective-2026-05-27.json into summarizeReport, verify output size
steps: assert result.compressed has expected top-N fields

test_cases.title: Summarizer extracts MetricsSnapshot from raw report
test_cases.description: Verify extractMetricsSnapshot populates all fields from real data

test_cases.title: Anomaly detection finds tool failures > 10%
test_cases.description: Verify detectAnomalies flags bash and other tools with high failure rates
steps: construct report with tool_stats.by_tool.bash = { calls: 100, failures: 15 }
assert result contains anomaly with type='tool_failure' for bash

test_cases.title: Anomaly detection finds dormant skills
test_cases.description: Verify skills with 0 triggers are flagged as dormant
steps: construct report with skill_health containing entries with triggers=0
assert result contains anomaly with type='dormant_skill'

test_cases.title: Metrics history sliding window caps at 30
steps: assert oldest snapshot is the 2nd one written

test_cases.title: Trend delta filters by ±20% threshold
test_cases.description: Verify only significant changes appear in trends
steps: assert fields with <20% change are excluded

test_cases.title: Effect review compares pre/post apply metrics
test_cases.description: Given apply history + metrics snapshots, verify effect calculation
steps: create apply history entry with metricsSnapshotDate='2026-05-25'
assert after is from latest snapshot

test_cases.title: GC removes old reports keeping newest 3
test_cases.description: Create 5 report files, verify GC deletes 2 oldest
steps: create 5 JSON files in reports/ with different timestamps

test_cases.title: GC removes old daily files beyond 90 days
test_cases.description: Create daily files spanning 100 days, verify old ones deleted

test_cases.title: Judge spawns with stdin, not CLI args
test_cases.description: Verify runJudge uses stdin pipe for userMessage
steps: call runJudge with small signal file
assert args do NOT contain the signal data as a positional argument

test_cases.title: Full handleEvolve produces pending.json without error
test_cases.description: End-to-end test with real data, mock judge
steps: mock runJudge to return 1 sample suggestion
call handleEvolve({ target: 'all', since: '7d', sample: undefined }, dirs)
assert signal JSON created in signals/

test_cases.title: ESLint passes with 0 errors
test_cases.description: Run npm run lint on project root
